description_long: This object depicts a police officer standing upright, dressed in a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt with white and red trim on the sleeves and a visible police insignia on the chest. The officer wears a black tactical vest with a prominent 'POLICE' label and a utility belt around the waist, which appears to hold various equipment. The pants are black and fitted, with reinforced knee areas, and the officer is wearing gray athletic shoes. The figure's head is uncovered, and the skin is a uniform gray, suggesting a mannequin or training figure. The overall appearance is that of a modern urban patrol officer, equipped for active duty in city environments.
description: A modern police officer in a dark blue short-sleeved uniform with a tactical vest, utility belt, and black pants, ready for urban patrol.
description_view_0: Front view showing the police insignia, tactical vest, and utility belt details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the vest, belt, and sleeve trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tactical vest and fitted black pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm patch and side profile of the uniform and equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: Short-sleeved dark blue patrol shirt with white and red sleeve trim, black tactical vest labeled 'POLICE', fitted black pants, and gray athletic shoes.
